title: Service Registration Schema
description: Defines the service capabilities discovered during handshake. Maps to the GET /capabilities response in the Hybrid Mode API.

id.description: Unique identifier for this service registration

tunable_ids.description: List of tunable IDs this service exposes (maps to capability_ids in Hybrid Mode API)

supports_evaluate.description: Whether separate evaluate endpoint is available

max_payload_bytes.description: Maximum request payload size in bytes (null = unlimited)

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this service was registered

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update to this registration
